onua-nuva-2002.notes: I got all 6 Toa Nuva and a Rahkshi for Christmas that year.

tahu-2001.notes:
I decided after Generation 1 ended, I should catch up on what I had missed. 

This was my first ever BrickLink purchase. I found it after checking eBay and seeing that none of the Toa were on there at the time.
